headline: Gen Cyber Safety Brands Sweep 28 Honors from the World's Top Independent Testing Labs, Nearly Doubling Last Year's Recognition
summary: Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), a global leader dedicated to powering Digital Freedom, today celebrates that its consumer Cyber Safety brands Norton, Avast, AVG and Avira earned 28 annual award recognitions – up from 16 the year before – from the world's most respected independent testing organizations: AV-Comparatives, AV-Test, SE Labs and AVLab.
